---
title:  "Safer Streets Priority Finder Report"
subtitle: "Study Name: {{< meta params.study_name >}} | Date Report Created: {{< meta params.report_date >}}"
format: 
    pdf:
        keep-tex: true # for debugging
        highlight-style: tango
        include-in-header: preamble.tex # for custom latex packages (print python error messages properly)
        toc: true
        toc-title: Contents
engine: jupyter
jupyter: "sspf_venv"
execute:
    echo: false
    warning: false
    error: false

# ideally, we should set default parameters here for toggling report sections
# such as:
# params:
#   show_intro: true
#   show_data_attributes: true
#   show_descriptive_stats: true
#   show_sliding_windows: true
#   show_models: true
# then when invoking the report generation, we can override them in the cli command
# but for some reason params defined in the qmd would take precedence, it seems like a bug of quarto, 
# for now, the workaround is to explicitly set them in the cli command, which is currently constructed by python
---
```{python}
#| tags: [parameters]
# parameters for python code
host = None
port = None
user = None
password = None
db_name = None
schema = None
study_name = None
study_id = None
```

<!-- AUTO-SECTIONS:START -->
<!-- AUTO-SECTIONS:END -->
